maintained_note: Maintained tier->model resolution for emitted operator systems. The scaffold-plan keeps shape-correct PLACEHOLDERS (model-high/standard/fast); this registry supplies the real generation-time --model resolution (the wizard's programmatic-model rule: an emitted start-session.sh must carry a real --model, never a manually-selected one) through the assembler's model_tiers override seam. UPDATE these strings when the prescribed Claude family changes; the update propagates to operator projects through the foundation-versioning upgrade path. Budget-conditioned tiering is intentionally OUT of v0 scope: one fixed family map, no budget-driven downgrade.
